violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC stated manager had stepped out for supplies. PIC is scheduled to take exam on 8/29/25. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Staff removed, cleaned and sanitized utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The dumpster area was observed with discarded furniture and trash debris. Dumpster areas must be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions.PIC contacted landlord, who stated they are in process of having items removed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
Floor tiles of the threshold of the rear entrance were observed broken and/or missing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Various sandwich ingredients were observed held at 47-55 degrees Fahrenheit in sandwich prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and unused bagel boards in the back area have an accumulation of minimal rodent droppings and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

Trash was observed stored on the ground in the refuse area. Areas for trash, returnables, recyclables shall be kept free of litter and trash and maintained clean. Per PIC, removal services are on route for pick-up. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023
